chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-514 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 12.05.2025 None present for the petitioner. No intimation is received. On the last date of hearing no one was present on behalf of the petitioner. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed in non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Hafiz
